title: HeartLess Horizon
description: A plugin inspired by the HeartLess Horizon Series
body:
> **Disclaimer:** This is an unofficial remake of the HeartLess Horizon plugin concept. I am not affiliated with the original HeartLess Horizon server or team. This plugin is a fan-made recreation and I do not claim any credit for the original gameplay concept.

# ⛔ **PROJECT STATUS: DISCONTINUED**

This plugin is no longer maintained.

* No future updates
* No bug fixes
* Limited real server usage

The plugin stays available as is.
It might break on future Minecraft versions.



# ❤️ HeartLess Horizon
A hardcore survival plugin inspired by the Heartless Horizon series. Players start with 10 hearts. Each death permanently removes 2 hearts. When you reach 0 hearts, you're eliminated from the server unless an admin revives you.

[![This Could Be Your Ad](https://i.imgur.com/JTJ56Wb.png)](https://discord.gg/lusik)

# 🔹Features
- **Dynamic Heart System**
  Players lose 2 hearts permanently with each death.
- **Color-Coded Nametags**
  Heart indicators appear in player nametags with colors that change based on remaining health.
- **Death Elimination**
  When a player hits 0 hearts, they're automatically banned from the server.
- **Admin Revival System**
  Administrators can revive eliminated players, restoring them to full 10 hearts.

---

## Commands & Permissions
| Command                    | Permission         | Description                           |
| -------------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------- |
| /revive <player>           | heartless.revive   | Revive an eliminated player           |
| /hearts set <player> <amt> | heartless.hearts   | Set a player's hearts to a specific amount |
| /hearts add <player> <amt> | heartless.hearts   | Add hearts to a player                |

---

## How It Works
1. **New players join** → Start with 10 hearts (20 health)
2. **Player dies** → Loses 2 hearts permanently
3. **Reaches 0 hearts** → Gets banned from the server
4. **Admin revival** → Use `/revive` to restore a player to full 10 hearts

---

## Heart Color Guide
- **10 hearts** → 💚 Green
- **8-9 hearts** → 💛 Yellow-Green
- **6-7 hearts** → 💛 Yellow
- **4-5 hearts** → 🧡 Orange
- **1-3 hearts** → ❤️ Red
- **0 hearts** → 🖤 Black (Eliminated)

---

Need help or have suggestions? Feel free to reach out via my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/BrGdf2GMuT).

**Made by Lusik21556** (@lusik_2155)
